name: Knupple Park Silsbee, TX
description: Knupple Park Silsbee, TX is a place to play pickleball in Silsbee, TX. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Lumberton City Park
description: Lumberton City Park is a place to play pickleball in Lumberton, TX. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.
